commands.summary: All 17 conformance cases passed. The corpus now covers provenance admission and completion rejection, status-directory mismatch, invalid semantic version, schema-invalid evidence, orphan work, disjoint active scopes, and missing/stale dashboards in addition to the existing cases.

All 6 focused conformance tests passed, including bidirectional omitted-rule and unknown-rule failures, exact fixture-directory declaration, reference-suite agreement, and deterministic reporting of unexpected secondary violations.
SPEC derived blocks regenerated without drift and repository governance validation passed with the expanded rule inventory and corpus.
All 112 unit tests passed with the two declared formal-model tests skipped.
The declared jsonschema dependency and its requirements are installed.
The operator's instruction to proceed with WI-030 authorized the conformance-manifest schema extension; the acknowledged frozen-surface backstop passed without weakening an invariant.
